component.name: Logitune
component.summary: Configure your Logitech MX Master 3S mouse

description.p: Logitune is a Linux configurator for Logitech peripherals, starting with the MX Master 3S. It provides per-application profiles for button remapping, gesture configuration, DPI/SmartShift/scroll settings, and thumb wheel modes (volume, zoom, horizontal scroll).
Features include automatic profile switching on window focus, HID++ 2.0 communication via Bolt receiver, and a dark-themed Qt Quick UI matching Logitech Options+.
Initial release with MX Master 3S support.
